name: Saurav Chopade
title: Full Stack Engineer
tagline: Python • React • TypeScript • Node.js • AI Integration
summary: Full Stack Engineer with end-to-end ownership of 3 live production applications — covering React 19 / TypeScript frontend, Python Flask & Express.js backend, PostgreSQL / Supabase database design, and Vercel / AWS cloud deployment. Delivered a Twilio + Gemini AI powered calling bot handling real-time voice calls, an OAuth 2.0 multi-provider image platform with Supabase Row-Level Security, and an AI-driven interior design system achieving ~40% inference latency reduction via async processing and model optimization. Proficient in system design, microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and agile delivery. Oracle Cloud AI Foundations Certified.
achievements: Built and shipped 3 production-grade full-stack applications — all live and publicly accessible on Vercel
Reduced AI inference latency by ~40% on the Interior Design system through async processing, request batching, and caching strategies
Improved backend data pipeline throughput by ~25% through ML model optimization at Voice of Ether internship
Integrated Twilio real-time voice SDK + Google Gemini AI into a single production application, enabling AI-generated dynamic call scripts for 100+ leads
Implemented OAuth 2.0 multi-provider authentication (Google, GitHub, Facebook) with zero unauthorized access incidents across 100+ test users
Reduced cross-platform API integration time by ~35% by designing RESTful microservices with clear contracts

projects.name: ColdCaller.io — AI Cold Calling Platform
projects.description: Full-stack cold calling application with React 19 (TypeScript) frontend, Express.js/Node.js backend, and PostgreSQL. Integrates Twilio SDK for real-time voice calling with Gemini AI auto-generating dynamic call scripts. Lead management system with Excel import, status tracking, and analytics — reducing manual sales effort by ~60%.

projects.name: Image Search Platform — Multi-Provider OAuth
projects.description: Production full-stack image search app with 97% TypeScript codebase. Integrates Unsplash API with multi-provider OAuth 2.0 (Google, Facebook, GitHub) via Supabase Auth with Row Level Security. Zero unauthorized access incidents across 100+ test users.

projects.name: AI-Driven Virtual Interior Design System
projects.description: Full-stack AI web application using Python/Flask backend and React.js frontend that generates photorealistic interior designs from room images. Integrated ControlNet and Stable Diffusion via REST APIs, optimizing inference pipeline by ~40% through async processing and request caching.

projects.name: AigentX — Web3 AI Agent Marketplace
projects.description: Decentralised marketplace where AI agents offer services. Includes smart contracts (ERC-20 token, Escrow, Staking), FastAPI backend with wallet authentication, and Next.js frontend with Wagmi/RainbowKit for Web3 interactions.

experience.description: Designed and deployed scalable RESTful APIs using Python and Flask; reduced cross-platform integration time by ~35% across 3+ microservices. Built React.js/TypeScript frontends integrated with Flask/Express backends. Engineered ML models for predictive analytics pipelines, improving data processing throughput by ~25% through feature engineering and batch processing.

education.institution: GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur

certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate — Oracle — Aug 2025 to Aug 2027
